channel.title: run commands on ilo
channel.description: Recent content in run commands on ilo

item.title: Run Commands
item.description: In order to simplify/automate its usage, ilo will look for run command files in the following locations: .ilo/ilo.rc .ilo.rc Each file found will be added in-order as an argument file to your invocation of ilo before any other options you specify in your terminal.
